category_title: Preschoolers with frequent inappropriate social behaviors (yelling, taking toys, crying)
scenario_title: Frequent inappropriate social behaviors during preschool routines
minimal_context: Gregory is participating in free play time with his peers in the preschool classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for free play. Go pick a center and play with the other children.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Walks over to a peer) I want those! (Takes the other child's toys)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Hides the toys behind his back) No!

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Yells at the other child and starts crying) They are mine!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for free play. Go pick a center and play with the other children.

STUDENT: (Walks over to a peer) I want those! (Takes the other child's toys)

TUTOR: Let's try to play together.

STUDENT: (Hides the toys behind his back) No!

TUTOR: Remember to use your words.

STUDENT: (Yells at the other child and starts crying) They are mine!

task.content: Participating in classroom routines and social interactions with peers
task.learning_goal: To get more thumbs up than thumbs down at the end of the day and engage in more rule-following behaviors

context.environment: Preschool classroom at Edgewood Pines Early Childhood Center
context.materials: Thumbs Up sheet, timer on watch, teaching matrix, choice board (nature walk, clean lunch trays, computer)
context.social_setting: Interacting with other children and preschool teachers (Mr. Hughes and Ms. Valencia)
context.time_context: Throughout the day, specifically right before each change in routine

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: During social interactions with peers in the preschool classroom
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Engages in inappropriate social behaviors, such as yelling at other children, taking their toys, hiding toys and other children's belongings, and crying

behavior_patterns.condition: Even with the universal supports in place
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Has an average of 23 instances of misbehavior per day
